response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth and versatility across multiple languages and systems, with experience in high-scale systems and experimentation-related work. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of AI-first growth systems, experimentation platforms, or feature-flagging systems, which are core to the role. His recent work leans toward AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, which is relevant but not a perfect match.
strengths: Proven track record in high-scale systems and low-latency applications (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Deep software engineering fundamentals with experience in multiple languages and paradigms (C++, D, JavaScript, TypeScript, etc.)
Active open-source contributor and educator with experience in building platforms and mentoring teams
concerns: No clear evidence of building or maintaining experimentation/measurement platforms or feature-flagging systems
Limited mention of AI-first growth systems or systematic experimentation frameworks
Recent roles focus more on AI-agent infrastructure and pricing optimization rather than growth/experimentation measurement
